name: bootstrap eval: each scenario runs in an isolated temp workdir; no permanent state created outside the report file
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/init-guardrails.sh" --run-bootstrap-evals --emit-report "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/report.json" --trace-tmpdirs 2>out.txt && grep -E "tmpdir.*cleaned" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
